name: Merck & Co., Inc.
business: Merck & Co., Inc. is a global health care company that delivers innovative health solutions through its prescription medicines, including biologic therapies, vaccines and animal health products. The Company sells human health pharmaceutical products primarily to drug wholesalers and retailers, hospitals, government agencies, and managed health care providers. The Company sells animal health products to veterinarians, distributors, animal producers, farmers and pet owners.

exposures.sentence: The Company sells these human health pharmaceutical products primarily to drug wholesalers and retailers, hospitals, government agencies, and managed health care providers such as health maintenance organizations, pharmacy benefit managers and other institutions.
The Company also offers an extensive suite of digitally connected identification, traceability and monitoring products.

catalysts.event: Keytruda Qlex FDA approval across most adult solid tumor indications
catalysts.sentence: September 2025 FDA approval across most adult solid tumor indications for Keytruda.

catalysts.event: Enflonsia FDA approval for RSV prevention in neonates and infants
catalysts.sentence: June 2025 FDA approval for the prevention of RSV lower respiratory tract disease in neonates (newborns) and infants who are born during or entering their first RSV season.

catalysts.event: Capvaxive EC approval for pneumococcal disease prevention
catalysts.sentence: March 2025 EC approval for the prevention of invasive pneumococcal disease and pneumococcal pneumonia caused by certain serotypes in individuals 18 years of age and older.

catalysts.event: Expected loss of U.S. market exclusivity for Januvia and Janumet
catalysts.sentence: the Company expects that Januvia and Janumet will not lose market exclusivity in the U.S. until May 2026
The FDA set a PDUFA, or target action, date of April 28, 2026 for the new drug application

catalysts.event: Welireg PDUFA date for adjuvant RCC combination with Keytruda
catalysts.sentence: The FDA set a PDUFA date of June 19, 2026.

catalysts.event: Winrevair PDUFA date for label update based on HYPERION trial
catalysts.sentence: The FDA set a PDUFA date of September 21, 2026.

catalysts.event: Keytruda expected to be selected for IRA government price setting in 2027, effective 2029
catalysts.sentence: the Company expects that Keytruda will be selected in 2027 for government price setting, which would become effective on January 1, 2029

catalysts.event: Lenvima selected for government price setting effective 2028
catalysts.sentence: in January 2026, HHS announced that Lenvima has been selected for government price setting, the set price for which will become effective on January 1, 2028.
